title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 13 - 2017: Clement of Alexandria

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief late-night update on his 'Living in Boulder' vlog series. He explains recent upload difficulties, mentions completing a video on Cyprian and working on one about Clement of Alexandria, and shares personal updates including his mom getting a tricycle and plans to sell his motorcycle to his brother.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: frustrated by repeated crashes but persisting with the church fathers series
still feels like he can't finish it but is tracking ahead and nearly done
planning to sell it to his brother

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-Log for June 13th, 2013. 1142 at night right now. I didn't get my green screen up again today, but I'll try to do it tomorrow.

I didn't want to do videos on here before I took my stuff off, because in between my Google Earth 20K thing, I had titties. You're not supposed to have titties showing on the video if you want to be family friendly.

But, um, but, uh, I can record now in my room, whenever I want anyway. I think the, uh, volume works well in here, the acoustics. So, I've been working on, the last time I did a video, it took like two days to upload.

It just kept crashing, like stopping, uploading, and I had to keep uploading it over and over again. Um, but, uh, anyway, since then, I, um, I did Cyprian, and, um, uh, which took a while. And then, now I'm doing Clement of Alexandria. Um, I can't remember what it's called, but, but yeah, I'm back, uh,

I've been working a lot, which has been gobbling up my time, uh, making my, uh, progress slow down. Um, my mom got a tricycle, and, uh, so we went on our first ride today. Um, try to get her out and go on some more, because she was right next to the bike path, and it'd be awesome to have adventure all over Boulder. Um, new places.

There, and then, then I gave my motorcycle, or I think I'm going to sell, let alone my motor, my brother, my motorbike, I think I'm going to sell to him. Um, and, um, so, um, I think, yeah, tomorrow, I'm going to do Alexander of, no, no, Clement of Alexandria.

Yeah. And, um, yeah, more Church Fathers and stuff that I've prepared. But, yeah, I don't know if there's any huge books coming my way, so I'm back into doing a fast pace. Um, looking forward to finishing this.

I still feel like I can finish it, you know. So, you know, I'm either, I'm either, like, almost done, or I haven't realized how big it is. But, yeah, I'm still trucking ahead. I'm getting all of the books from the, uh, ancient world, ancient Western world, on my website. Um, okay, peace out.
